title: PlayPLTX analytics schema (lean & deep)
description: Ten core event types emitted via logEvent() → saveToFirestore(eventType, params). Economy load and upgrade modal open are intentionally not logged. Every payload should include condition where the game state exposes it (experiment / CFG).

coreEvents.name: session_start
coreEvents.when: Once after consent, when the main app layout is shown and the session is ready.

payload.consent: boolean — true when emitted from the consent/start path

coreEvents.name: building_action
coreEvents.when: Shop star upgrade (upgradeVillageItem), island cannon/wall/castle flows, or blocked attempts.

payload.building: string — village slot: Castle | Cannon | Statue | Farm | Boat; failures may use Cannon2 for second cannon
payload.reason: string — optional on failure: capped_by_castle | not_enough_coins | already_max | wall_not_owned
payload.cannonIslandLevelAfter: number — optional, island cannon tier after success
payload.wallIslandLevelAfter: number — optional, wall tier after success
payload.castleStageMaxed: boolean — implied when action is max from castle stage cap
payload.source: string — optional 'wall_unlock_purchase' for first wall buy + Statue star

coreEvents.notes: action 'max' when village building hits 5★, island cannon/wall hits MAX_LEVEL, or castle stage hits max on the same upgrade. Failures never call upgradeVillageItem.

coreEvents.name: slot_action
coreEvents.when: Once per completed spin after reels resolve, payout applied, and triple-spins bonus (if any) applied—before attack/raid minigames.

payload.energyBefore: number — energy immediately before this spin (after −1 cost)
payload.energyAfter: number — after triple-spins bonus if triggered
payload.payoutCoins: number — coins added this spin from the table
payload.spinsBonus: number — extra spins from triple Spins row; 0 if none
payload.reactionTimeMs: number — ms since previous spin (UI metric)

coreEvents.name: rival_interaction
coreEvents.when: Attack fully resolved, or raid finished (single event includes travel context).

coreEvents.name: energy_update
coreEvents.when: Timer grants a spin; out-of-spins modal opens; dev refill button.

payload.nextRefillTime: number — epoch ms; refill and depleted_modal

coreEvents.name: tutorial_progress
coreEvents.when: Main guided tutorial step logging (logTutorialStep); mini-tutorial finished (finishMiniTutorial).

coreEvents.name: player_level_up
coreEvents.when: XP crosses level threshold in gainXp().

coreEvents.name: island_travel
coreEvents.when: Cloud travel sequence to/from rival island.

intentionallyRemoved.name: economy_config_loaded
intentionallyRemoved.reason: Not required for research; config load remains console-only on failure.

intentionallyRemoved.name: upgrade_modal_opened
intentionallyRemoved.reason: High-volume UI noise; use building_action / slot_action for behavioral signals.
